title: Telangana TS Inter Results 2026 LIVE Update: Results declared, check your result on Tgbie.cgg.gov.in website
description: TS Telangana Inter 1st 2nd Year Result 2026 tgbie.cgg.gov.in: The TS inter results 2026 have been declared for examinations which were held between February 26 and March 18. Around 9.9 lakh students had appeared in the exam.
